qa_pair.question: Using the App Store Connect tools, find the App Store territory whose name is the United States. What is its territory resource id (the three-letter code)?
List App Store territories and find the United Kingdom. What is its territory resource id?
I want to price an in-app purchase in Japan. According to App Store Connect's territory data, what is the territory resource id for Japan?
Using the territory data from App Store Connect, what three-letter ISO currency code is associated with the Japan (JPN) territory?
According to App Store Connect's territory data, what currency code applies to the Germany (DEU) territory?
I'm configuring pricing for Australia. What is the App Store Connect territory resource id for Australia?
Using the territory data, what currency code does App Store Connect use for the Canada (CAN) territory?
According to App Store Connect's territory data, what currency code is used for the Switzerland (CHE) territory?
Find the App Store territory for Brazil using the tools. What is its territory resource id?
Using App Store Connect's territory data, what currency code applies to the India (IND) territory?
